title: Communauté de communes du Val de Noye
summary: The Communauté de communes du Val de Noye  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in May 2001. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Avre Luce Noye in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Val de Noye  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in May 2001. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Avre Luce Noye in January 2017.

Composition
This communauté de communes comprised 26 communes:
